description_long: This bungalow features a modern, boxy design with clean lines and a flat roof. The exterior is predominantly white with accents of gray and beige, and the main structure is elevated above a darker base. The front facade includes a series of vertical slats or louvers, likely for privacy or sun shading, and a large open terrace or deck area with a wooden floor. A rectangular extension juts out from one side, possibly serving as a garage or additional room, and there are large window panels visible on the side. The overall structure is low and wide, with a single story and a minimalist aesthetic.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, white and gray exterior, and a large open terrace with wooden flooring.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, vertical slats, and the open terrace area with wooden flooring.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rectangular extension and the depth of the terrace area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the long, continuous terrace and large window panels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the terrace railing and the solid base of the structure.
